title: Config file parsing (config.toml)
description: Parse config.toml with serde + toml crate. Sections: [server] (bind, domain, data_dir), [[feed]] (persona, url, poll_interval), [[webhook]] (persona, key), [watch] (persona, path, published, pattern). Validate on load: referenced personas exist check deferred to runtime, poll_interval parses as duration, paths are absolute.
close_reason: Schema in db.rs, ID gen in id.rs, config parsing with validation in config.rs
